description:
Create a Bridge Command scenario named 'z) Stress Test' in /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/z) Stress Test/ where three traffic vessels are synchronized to collide with the Own Ship exactly 12 minutes after the start.

Own Ship ('Cadet Vessel'): Lat 50.5, Long -1.0, Heading 000, Speed 12.0 kts.

Traffic Vessels (othership.ini):
1. Head-on: Container ship, Heading 180, Speed 18.0 kts, approaching from ahead.
2. Crossing: Ferry, Heading 270, Speed 12.0 kts, approaching from Starboard (East).
3. Overtaking: Tanker, Heading
